title: [MTR4] Seoul Metro 4000 series (4th batch)
description: Resource pack that adds Seoul Metro 4000 series (4th batch) into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
*A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway.*

# Overview
In 2022, Seoul Transport Corporation, i.e., Seoul Metro, placed an order of 21 new trains for Line 4 to replace the existing older 4000 series. These trains are built by Dawonsys and are expected to enter service from September 2022, however, multiple issues have caused these trains to enter service 10 months late, on 12th July 2023. As of July 17 most of the trains entered service, with 2 sets (D469 and 470) still in trial run and construction, respectively.

This resource pack is to add Seoul Metro 4000 series (4th batch) into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in July 2025.

# What will be in this pack?
### Seoul Metro 4000 series
1. 4th batch

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seoul Transport Corporation.
